programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey try to find a way to arrest the son of a immunized diplomat whos using his nations embassy to avoid justice after hitting a poor man with his car

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: Starsky and Hutch try to bust Mr Amboy for his involvement in prostitution numbers and drugs despite their first Bicentennial bribery offer and the threat of a harassment charge

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Hawke meets a mercenary who claims to have information regarding his missing brother

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki Ryan and Jack track down a cursed scalpel that has found its way into the hands of a talented surgeon

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: When a debtor and his friends resort to baseball bats chaos erupts and Lou Lyndah and Sonia fight not only with them but also with each other Down in Texas Matt and Froy wait to clear up Froys warrant and get in way over their heads working for a local repo team Meanwhile Lou decides to re-hire Frankie despite Sonia and Lyndahs objections but first Lou wants to see how Frankie fares when faced with the temptation in the form of strippers and alcohol

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Down in Texas Matt and Froy are staking out a cement mixer but their repo turns disastrous when an innocent bystander gets showered in concrete In LA Frankie takes the reins with an alcoholic debtor and Lou and Sonia deal with a diva who pushes Sonia to her breaking point TV-14-L

programme.title: Utah
programme.desc: Misunderstanding what her ranch is worth Dorothy Bryant sells the land for far less than its value so it is up to Roy to somehow get it back

programme.title: Song of the Gringo
programme.desc: Several miners are killed and their mines are confiscated by a mysterious person Tex an undercover cop is asked to investigate the murders However Tex ends up being implicated as a criminal

programme.title: This Man Cant Die
programme.desc: An adventurer vows revenge after he returns home to find his parents murdered and his sister traumatised by the killer

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Luke jeopardize Kates chances to be named to a church committee when they unwittingly allow a Las Vegas gambling house to advertise on the McCoys barn

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilber enters into a televised debate against a respected member of the community who wants to ban horses from the neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger wants to get out of having to take a trip to San Francisco with Kay and The Posts so he tricks Wilbur into believing that Mister Ed is suddenly going bald which in turn makes Ed a nervous wreck

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A quick-talking salesman discovers gold on Lucas property and tries to fleece McCain of the mineral rights on his ranch

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Micah is badly injured by an escaping prisoner Lucas tracks the prisoner back to his home town where they do not give up their own

programme.title: Gunsmoke S08E19 Cotters Girl
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S08E19 Cotters Girl

programme.title: Bonanza 323
programme.desc: Bonanza 323

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Jim and Artie must protect a key member of a wealthy investment group whose surviving member stands to inherit the groups sizable assets

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday becomes emotionally involved in a rape-murder case of a Japanese-American war widow especially after he sees how beautiful she was and after he finds out that she left a young daughter behind Also there might be a connection with the rape of another woman the previous night Now Friday and Gannon must search for the rapist before he strikes again

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A police officer is shot during a routine stop of a car Friday and Gannon find the driver and passenger and learn they are paroled convicts The police officer cannot remember anything about the shooting event to help convict the two men

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble saves his boss life garnering the ranch owners powerful protection but Kimble doesnt want his favors because the owners a hit-man gone legit With Lt Gerard closing in the wealthy retired assassin sends the detective in the opposite direction from the fugitive into a trap where Gerard will be taken off the hunt for good

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike unwittingly becomes involved in the preparation of an underwater bank robbery

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Wealthy and successful middle-aged businessman Leo Burns suspects that his much younger wife Bridget is having an extramarital affair Leo hires sleazy private investigator GG Devoe to find out the identity of Bridgets lover

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: The Parisian underworld clashes with a greedy developer whose plans are not in line with theirs

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: Bogus preacher Brother Charles preys upon the misfortune of attractive young homeless women by leading them toward prostitution under the guise of spreading brotherly love The fake priests scam comes to a sudden halt when mysterious stigmata appear on the hands of his latest flock member Alice Ames as she performs her mission

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric meets a good witch in the woods who offers to cure him She gives a love potion to a girl whos boyfriend dies after taking it The boys dad blaming her shows up with his buddies and burns her house down with her in it

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric working in a Mom-and-Pop diner has to save the day when a gang of bikers show up to terrorize Mom Pop and a pretty customer Soups on werewolf style

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A known pornographer being investigated by Nick kills Nicks snitch when he finds a wire on him Will Nick have to commit perjury to convict him

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A record store clerk with psychotic tendencies is granted unspeakable powers by a magical pendant which he abuses to fulfill his dream of meeting a beautiful rock star

programme.title: Fright Night 2
programme.desc: Fright Night Part 2 is a sequel to link=tt0089175] Charley Brewster and the horror host Peter Vincent must face more vampires out for revenge

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Freddys Nightmares

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A jaded has-been photographer plots the demise of his younger talented protégé when they go on assignment in Central America

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa breaks up Floras romance and is forced to propose to her

programme.title: Smart 411
programme.desc: Smart 411

programme.title: Smart 517
programme.desc: Smart 517

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ befriends the Tiptons an elderly but feisty couple being forced out of their home and into a retirement community that is being used as a cover for an illegal skin flick operation

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: After Clint Eastwood moves into the neighborhood Mister Ed sets up a party line with his house which causes nothing but problems for Mr Eastwood

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: A going-on-15-year-old boy-crazy girl has moved into the neighborhood

programme.title: Hogans 314
programme.desc: Hogans 314

programme.title: Hogans 328
programme.desc: Hogans 328

programme.title: Mchale 412
programme.desc: Mchale 412

programme.title: Mchales Navy
programme.desc: Ensign Charles Parker - Newly assigned to the 73 Crew as Executive Officer - Is Binghamtons last hope to tame McHale and his pirates Though Parker is unwelcome at first McHale sees potential in the young Officer and orders his Crew to shape up so that Parker wont be shipped out

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A trouble maker transfers into the platoon and decides to make Pyle his patsy Gomer tries to handle it with understanding and kindness - but soon learns that bullies need to be stood up against

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After being bawled out by Sgt Carter for not working hard enough Gomer decides not accept his pay for that week which causes all sorts of troubles for Sgt Carter

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: After somebody breaks into the supply hut everyone suspects that a killer may be on the island--except for the Skipper who thinks that it may be part of a voodoo curse

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Skipper and Mr Howell compete for leadership on the island by being named President When the castaways cast their votes the result is surprising

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: After one full year of marriage Luke and Kate finally get to go on their honeymoon

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Marital suspicions lead a woman to accidentally kill her husband but when his debt-ridden brother tries to step into his place the Harts blow his cover and the widow may take her own revenge

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Everyone in town assumes Joanna is having an affair with a man she meets in her wine tasting class

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: While spending all his time at WPIV producing the stations 5th anniversary show Michael falls for his assistant Susan and breaks up with Stephanie

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: After being unknowingly entered into the Outstanding Armed Services Family of the Year competition and getting picked the Major refuses to do it but the family wants to Things get heated as a rude family is competing against them

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligans Christmas wish appears to be coming true when a radio broadcast tells them their rescue is imminent While they wait they recall the first days on the island when Gilligan lost the radio and transmitter

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch goes undercover as a female impersonator when the agency investigates a series of assaults on a drag-show company

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Matt go to a garden center to repo a forklift but a language barrier causes chaos Matt and Froy are in danger when Froy refuses to call the cops on a gun-wielding debtor

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: With the pressure of Froys legal problems mounting the team does everything they can to convince him to hire a lawyer Froy and Matt confront a misogynist frat boy with a dark secret Sonia and Froy wrangle with a squadron of costumed rally racers and Lou Matt and Froy get the surprise of a lifetime when theyre faced with a truck-full of vicious gangsters

programme.title: The Three Musketeers
programme.desc: DArtagnan and his Musketeer comrades thwart the plans of Cardinal Richelieu to usurp King Louis XIIIs power

programme.title: Mozambique 1964
programme.desc: An out-of-work and penniless American pilot is offered work in Mozambique and promptly becomes an unwitting pawn in a world of drug smuggling kidnap and murder

programme.title: Hercules 224
programme.desc: Hercules 224

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: The resistance releases a virus of Augur on the Taelon headquarters in Washington Things get out of hand

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Harrison is kidnapped by a unique modern artist named Quinn whos actually one of the aliens being hunted by his kind Hes mysteriously immune to Earths bacteria so the other aliens want to learn his secret through dissection Quinn wants to set up a dialogue with Earths leaders to arrange a peaceful takeover of the planet as opposed to an all-out slaughter of humanity

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arrested for a murder he did not commit Wills situation looks desperate when his attorney turns out to be a crooked prosecutor with ambitions to rise to the senate Can Alec help prove his friends innocence

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Tressas estranged sister arrives unwittingly bringing danger with her As a class 5 hurricane rages will Alec be able to save his human friends

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A transmission from Dr Logan in Texas City leads the Alphans to believe that they can finally land back on Earth through a revolutionary teleportation process The downside is that it is now 2120 on Earth and the surface has become an unbreathable wasteland through centuries of pollution The Alphans though are intent on abandoning the wandering moon However due to a hitch the Alphan test subjects find themselves in a primitive and hostile environment It is Scotland in the fourteenth century where the Scots are at war with the English invaders who kidnap the Alphan trio

programme.title: I Come in Peace
programme.desc: A rebel police officer Jack Caines wants to bring an end to the drug trade and its top supplier Victor Manning Jack teams up with an FBI agent to launch an undercover operation to entrap Victor

programme.title: The Dukes the Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke assist Texas ranger Jude Emery in tracking down hardened criminal Snake Harmon But they must rely on a little help from their friends as well as Boss and Sheriff Byrd when they find themselves kidnapped by Harmons henchmen

programme.title: Hercules 211
programme.desc: Hercules 211

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Lieutenant Stone and Inspector Keller go after two insurance agents involved in the counterfeiting of an 1850 6¢ purple Guyana stamp with a value of 300000

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: An opposition leader of an Eastern Bloc nation has been captured by the chief of the countrys secret police Also seized was microfilm with a list of people who secretly support the opposition Phelps develops a plan that plays upon the astrology obsession the nations leader has Cinnamon poses as a famous astrologer while Barney and Rollin will have to operate from the cargo compartment of a plane transporting the captured opposition leader

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: Missing in Action 3
programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.title: The Octagon
programme.desc: A martial artist must defeat a plan by ninjas to create a worldwide training camp for terrorists

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: The Presidents Man
programme.desc: A US presidents highly classified secret agent must find a fearless replacement to take over his extremely dangerous military missions

programme.title: Revenge of the Dragon
programme.desc: Action star Ramon Zamora stars in this action packed golden oldie A cruel twist of fate turns a peaceful man into a one man death force as he embarks on a violent vengeance trial

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two seasoned adventurers recruited by a seemingly psychic woman with a treasure map go on an adventure to recover a horde of gold belonging to an ancient being called the Firewalker

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Cody Purtell at HK52.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Justin Basra takes on Jacob Smith at HK51. Justin comes with a tough wrestling background and ends with some lower back tightness. Cam MacDonald fights Sean Michaels and ends with a Tap Out! Cam had a hard weight cut and see how that impacts his fight against Sean Michaels.
